caption: Echelon / oblique order (closes #379): three player Spearmen units start bunched together, get box-selected, then a right-drag deploys them with the new ECHELON_RIGHT distribution mode instead of one straight rank -- watch the preview at tick 25 label "Echelon (right leads)" and step out three widening offsets before the drag is even released. Verified by state dump: by tick 1250 the line has settled into a clean staggered diagonal facing east, each unit exactly ECHELON_STEP (27 world units) further forward than its neighbour to the west -- the southernmost (right-flank) unit at x=776.9, the middle unit at x=749.9, and the northernmost (left-flank, trailing) unit at x=722.9. ECHELON_LEFT mirrors it, refusing the opposite flank instead.
